name: home
description: Windows utility suite — DX Light, Light Controls, CleanShot

scripts.start:cleanshot: dotnet build legacy/CleanShotW/CleanShotW.csproj -c Release -p:Platform=x64 && dotnet run --project src/Home.Standalone.CleanShot/Home.Standalone.CleanShot.csproj -c Release
scripts.start:legacy:cleanshot: dotnet build legacy/CleanShotW/CleanShotW.csproj -c Release -p:Platform=x64 && dotnet run --project legacy/CleanShotW/CleanShotW.csproj -c Release -p:Platform=x64
